title: NYISO LMP Real Time 15 Min CSV download
description:
NYISO LMPs in 15 minute intervals as reported by NYISO. These are Real Time
Commitment (RTC) values. RTC runs every 15 minutes and looks ahead 2.5 hours.

Includes All zone and generator level data. The location types present are:

- *Generator*
- *Zone* 

NOTE: in NYISO's raw data, a negative congestion component results in a higher LMP
value, which is the opposite of other ISOs. Thus, we flip the sign on the
congestion component before inserting into our database to be consistent with other
ISOs. This means that in our database, LMP = Energy + Congestion + Loss.
